name: Key Lime Cake--Florida
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add the liquids (eggs, oil, orange juice, vanilla, and lemon extract) to the dry mixture and blend well until smooth.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 15 minutes before removing it.
6. Prick holes all over the cooled cake with a fork.
7. For the glaze, mix key lime juice and powdered sugar until smooth.
8. Drizzle the glaze evenly over the top of the cake.
9. Cover the cake and refrigerate until ready to serve.
To serve: Cut into squares and garnish with whipped cream and thin lime slices.
